insights.title: Labor overran budget by 15.8%
insights.finding: Total labor actual $429,423 vs budget $370,930 — $58,493 unfavorable variance. Review crew mix and productivity.

insights.title: Scope stability — 6 executed COs net $74,784 (+0.00% of contract)
insights.finding: Minimal scope churn indicates well-defined contract and experienced GC. Candidate GC profile for future similar bids.

insights.title: Largest variance — cost code 230 (Finish Material) under by $57,935
insights.finding: Budget $260,675, actual $202,740 (-22.2%). Flag for bid calibration.
